Good service! During tourist season, it feels like they need to add another gas pump.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) They forgot the fuel cap; I drove about 160 km and had to return to the gas station. When I returned, they couldn't find the cap. The manager, a rather rude man, was smoking inside a room and wasn't very willing to help resolve the issue. After much discussion, without solving the problem, we said we would call the police. Only then did he decide to remove the fuel cap from his car and put it in our vehicle, as we were passing through on our way to the Atacama Desert. We decided to accept it.

(Original)
Esqueceram a tampa do combustível, andei cerca de 160 Km, tive que retornar para o posto. Quando retornei, nao acharam a tampa. O gerente, um senhor bastante rude, ficava fumando dentro de uma sala, não teve muita disposição de ajudar a resolver. Depois de muita conversa, sem resolver o problema, dissemos que chamaríamos a polícia. Somente à partir daí, ele resolveu retirar a tampa de combustível do carro dele, e colocou no nosso veiculo, pois estávamos de passagem para ir até o Atacama. Resolvemos aceitar.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRMHJTVkJBEAE
